OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: Clinician_AtGlanceSectionDetails

omniProcessElements.name: RA_SectionDetails
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "useFormulas" : true, "additionalOutput" : { "ShowFacilityOnboarding" : "=%Record:FacilityOnboardingCasesClosedCount% == 0 && %Record:FacilityOnboardingCasesNotClosedCount% > 0", "ShowSCPOnboarding" : "=%Record:SCPOnboardingCasesClosedCount% == 0 && %Record:SCPOnboardingCasesNotClosedCount% > 0", "ShowActiveFacility" : "=%Record:ActiveHPFCount% > 0", "ShowApplicant" : "=(ISBLANK(%Record:DeclineApplicant%) || %Record:DeclineApplicant% == 0) && (%Record:ActiveApplicant% > 0 || %Record:JobBoardApplicationCount% > 0)", "IsExternalUser" : "=ISNOTBLANK(%ProfileName%) && %ProfileName% == \"Core HC Customer Community Plus Login User\"", "ShowInactive" : "=(ISNOTBLANK(%Record:AllHPFCount%) && %Record:AllHPFCount% > 0) && ( ISBLANK(%Record:InactiveHPFCount%) || %Record:InactiveHPFCount% == 0)", "ShowProspect" : "=%Record:ProspectContact% > 0", "ShowSCPOffboarding" : "=%Record:SCPOffboardingCasesCount% > 0" }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ResponseAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SV_ExternalUserAccountId
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%ProfileName%==\"Core HC Customer Community Plus Login User\"", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "QueryId" : "=QUERY(\"Select AccountId from User where Id = '{0}'\",%UserId%)" }, "responseJSONPath" : "QueryId", "responseJSONNode" : "AccountId", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues5", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SV_RecordsCount
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "FacilityOnboardingCasesNotClosedCount" : "=COUNTQUERY ( \"SELECT COUNT() FROM Case WHERE Contact.AccountId = '{0}' AND Type = '{1}' AND ParentId = '{2}' AND (Status = '{3}' OR Status = '{4}') AND RecordTypeName__c ='{5}' \" , %AccountId%, \"Facility\",\"\", \"Not Started\",\"In Progress\",\"Clinician_Onboarding\")", "FacilityOnboardingCasesClosedCount" : "=COUNTQUERY ( \"SELECT COUNT() FROM Case WHERE Contact.AccountId = '{0}' AND Type = '{1}' AND ParentId = '{2}' AND (Status = '{3}') AND RecordTypeName__c ='{5}' \" , %AccountId%, \"Facility\",\"\", \"Closed\",\"Clinician_Onboarding\")", "SCPOnboardingCasesNotClosedCount" : "=COUNTQUERY ( \"SELECT COUNT() FROM Case WHERE Contact.AccountId = '{0}' AND Type = '{1}' AND ParentId = '{2}' AND (Status = '{3}' OR Status = '{4}') AND RecordTypeName__c ='{5}' \" , %AccountId%, \"SCP\",\"\", \"Not Started\",\"In Progress\",\"Clinician_Onboarding\")", "SCPOnboardingCasesClosedCount" : "=COUNTQUERY ( \"SELECT COUNT() FROM Case WHERE Contact.AccountId = '{0}' AND Type = '{1}' AND ParentId = '{2}' AND (Status = '{3}') AND RecordTypeName__c ='{5}' \" , %AccountId%, \"SCP\",\"\", \"Closed\",\"Clinician_Onboarding\")", "ActiveHPFCount" : "=COUNTQUERY ( \"SELECT COUNT() FROM HealthcarePractitionerFacility WHERE Practitioner.AccountId = '{0}' AND Status__c = '{1}' \" , %AccountId%,\"Active\")", "JobBoardApplicationCount" : "=COUNTQUERY ( \"SELECT COUNT() FROM bpats__Job_Board_Application__c where bpats__Status__c = '{0}' AND bpats__Contact__r.AccountId ='{1}' \" ,\"New\" ,%AccountId%)", "ExpiredContractCount" : "=COUNTQUERY( \"SELECT COUNT() FROM Contract WHERE AccountId = '{0}' AND Status = '{1}' AND RecordType.DeveloperName ='{3}' \" , %AccountId%, \"Expired\",\"Clinician\")", "ActiveApplicant" : "=COUNTQUERY( \"SELECT COUNT() from bpats__ATS_Applicant__c where bpats__Applicant_Status__c = '{0}' AND bpats__ATS_Applicant__r.AccountId = '{1}'\" ,\"Active\",%AccountId%)", "DeclineApplicant" : "=COUNTQUERY( \"SELECT COUNT() FROM bpats__ATS_Applicant__c where (bpats__Applicant_Status__c = '{0}' OR bpats__Stage__r.Name = '{1}') AND bpats__ATS_Applicant__r.AccountId = '{2}'\" ,\"Rejected\",\"Placement\",%AccountId%)", "InactiveHPFCount" : "=COUNTQUERY ( \"SELECT COUNT() FROM HealthcarePractitionerFacility WHERE Practitioner.AccountId = '{0}' AND Status__c != '{1}' \" , %AccountId%,\"Inactive\")", "ExecuetedContractCount" : "=COUNTQUERY( \"SELECT COUNT() FROM Contract WHERE AccountId = '{0}' AND Status = '{1}' AND RecordType.DeveloperName ='{3}' \" , %AccountId%, \"Executed\",\"Clinician\")", "ProspectContact" : "=COUNTQUERY( \"SELECT COUNT() FROM Contact WHERE AccountId = '{0}' AND Status__c = '{1}'\" , %AccountId%, \"Prospect\")", "AllHPFCount" : "=COUNTQUERY ( \"SELECT COUNT() FROM HealthcarePractitionerFacility WHERE Practitioner.AccountId = '{0}'\" , %AccountId%)", "SCPOffboardingCasesCount" : "=COUNTQUERY ( \"SELECT COUNT() FROM Case WHERE Contact.AccountId = '{0}' AND ParentId = '{1}' AND RecordTypeName__c ='{2}' \" , %AccountId%,\"\",\"Clinician_Offboarding\")\n" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "Record", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues3", "disOnTplt" : false }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : { }, "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "ttlMinutes" : 5, "mockResponseMap" : { } }
